title: Software Update - DFU is not available if phone's battery is below 30%
scenario: DFU is blocked with a pop-up when the phone's battery is below 30%, and tapping OK returns the user to Settings without starting the update.
steps: Ensure the phone's battery level is below 30%.
Attempt to start the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process.
Observe the pop-up message that appears.
Tap the OK button on the pop-up.
expected: A pop-up message informs the user that the battery does not have enough power and asks them to fully charge or plug into a power source. Tapping OK dismisses the pop-up and returns the user to the Settings page without starting the DFU process.
